label: Access
title: Some roles start fast. Others need preparation.
description: Entry-level jobs can get a character moving immediately, while specialist careers reward licences, qualifications, and clean records.

label: Reputation
title: Consistency matters in civilian RP.
description: Regular shifts, repeat clients, and professional conduct are what turn a simple job into contacts, referrals, and long-term story weight.

label: Standards
title: Requirements are part of the roleplay.
description: The requirements listed under each role are there to shape believable character choices and raise the standard of day-to-day city life.
